immigration.title: USCIS Updates Premium Processing Times for EB-1 Categories
immigration.excerpt: USCIS has revised premium processing timelines for EB-1A and EB-1C petitions, with implications for Chinese nationals in managerial and executive roles seeking expedited adjudication.

immigration.title: New I-140 Evidence Standards: What Chinese Professionals Need to Know
immigration.excerpt: USCIS officers are applying stricter evidentiary standards for extraordinary ability petitions, particularly affecting technology and finance professionals from China.

financial.title: Cross-Border Wealth Transfers: New IRS Reporting Thresholds
financial.excerpt: Updated IRS guidance on foreign gift and inheritance reporting thresholds directly impacts Chinese-American families receiving assets from abroad. Key deadlines and compliance steps outlined.

financial.title: U.S.-China Tax Treaty: Planning Opportunities for Dual Residents
financial.excerpt: Recent regulatory clarifications on the U.S.-China tax treaty create targeted planning opportunities for high-net-worth individuals holding assets in both jurisdictions.
